## Investment View
ALB-PA scores 80/100 as a constructive_bullish setup. The score is driven mainly by the technical breakout picture and ENTRY_READY status, with 1 constructive versus 0 adverse stock-specific signals and a market overlay impact of 0 supportive versus 0 adverse effects.

- Thesis: The setup is actionable only while the breakout level continues to hold and recent constructive signals, including the broader market overlay when relevant, keep getting follow-through.

## What Matters
- Price is holding above the prior 20-day high (75.73), a basic breakout confirmation signal. (high)
- Volume anomaly is strong at 3.39, which supports the move. (high)

## Risks / Invalidation
- A close back below 75.73 would weaken or invalidate the current breakout picture. (high)

## Catalysts
- The next 1 to 4 weeks matter most around whether price can keep holding above 75.73 and attract follow-through volume. (medium)
